zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Bayley於1542年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾特洛布利其時，她的父親John Bayley23歲，母親Bayley23歲。她於1567年與Thomas Weare在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1633年5月1日在英國英格蘭享年91歲，埋葬在英國肯特布拉布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Bayley于1542年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾特洛布利其时，她的父亲John Bayley23岁，母亲Bayley23岁。她于1567年与Thomas Weare在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1633年5月1日在英国英格兰享年91岁，埋葬在英国肯特布拉布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Bayley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bailey
meanings: English: status name for a steward or official, from Middle English bailli ‘manager, administrator’ (Old French baillis, from Late Latin baiulivus, an adjectival derivative of baiulus ‘attendant, carrier, porter’).
English: habitational name from Bailey in Little Mitton, Lancashire, named with Old English beg ‘berry’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

English: occasionally a topographic name for someone who lived by the outer wall of a castle, from Middle English (Old French) bailli ‘outer courtyard of a castle’ (Old French bail(le) ‘enclosure’, a derivative of bailer ‘to enclose’). This term became a placename in its own right, denoting a district beside a fortification or wall, as in the case of the Old Bailey in London, which formed part of the early medieval outer wall of the city.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Bayley was born in 1542, in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bayley, was 23 and her mother, Bayley, was 23. She married Thomas Weare in 1567, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 1 May 1633, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91, and was buried in Brabourne, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Bayley est née en 1542, à Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bayley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Bayley, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Weare en 1567, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 mai 1633, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Bayley 1542 in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bayley 23 und ihre Mutter Bayley 23. Sie hat 1567 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Weare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 1. Mai 1633 im Alter von 91 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brabourne, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Bayley è nata il nel 1542 nel Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Bayley, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Bayley, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Weare nel 1567, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 maggio 1633, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a Brabourne, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Bayleyが1542年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアトロウブリッジで生まれた時，父John Bayleyは23歳，母Bayleyは23歳であった。1567年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでThomas Weareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1633年5月1日にイギリスイギリスで91歳で死去し，イギリスケントブラボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Bayley(이)가 1542년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 트로우브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bayley(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bayley(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Thomas Weare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1633년 5월 1일 영국 잉글랜드에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 브라보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Bayley nasceu em 1542, em Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Bayley, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Bayley, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Weare em 1567, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1 de maio de 1633, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Bayley родилась в 1542 г. в местности троубридж, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bayley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Bayley, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Weare в 1567 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 1 мая 1633 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Bayley nació en 1542, en Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Bayley, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Bayley, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Weare en 1567, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1633, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultada en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra.
